items.title: Metaplanet raises $50M in zero-interest bonds to buy more Bitcoin
items.summary: Metaplanet raises $50 million through zero-interest bonds from EVO FUND to expand its Bitcoin treasury, extending its capital markets-driven accumulation strategy.

items.title: Mutation testing for the agentic era
items.summary: Code coverage is one of the most dangerous quality metrics in software testing. Many developers fail to realize that code coverage lies by omission: it measures execution, not verification. Test suites with high coverage can obfuscate the fact that critical functionality is untes

items.title: Bitcoin is on track for its best month in a year. $5 billion USDT growth fuels the rebound
items.summary: Strong earnings season trumps geopolitical risks for now, one trader said, as equities and crypto markets "stopped caring" about Iran war headlines.

items.title: Bitcoin stays 'stalled' at $78K as oil threatens new risk-asset squeeze
items.summary: Bitcoin and risk assets faced an uphill struggle after the S&P 500 hit new all-time highs as analysis warned that BTC price support was at risk.

items.title: Nakamoto taps Bitwise and Kraken for Bitcoin options strategy to hedge risk
items.summary: Nakamoto launched a Bitcoin derivatives program with Bitwise and Kraken, aiming to generate options premiums and hedge part of its BTC treasury exposure.

items.title: Strategy stock beats Bitcoin after rising 25% in a month: BTC bottom in?
items.summary: Historically, MSTR’s outperformance signals traders are taking more risk, betting Bitcoin’s worst drawdown phase may be over.

items.title: XRP price risks 40% decline versus Bitcoin despite 9-day ETF inflow streak
items.summary: Spot XRP ETFs record net inflows for nine consecutive days, absorbing sell pressure and potentially supporting XRP price recovery over time.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: The market repriced DeFi in just 48 hours
items.summary: Di Bartolomeo argues that last weekend the market achieved – in real time – a notable feat that no regulator, auditor or commentator has ever done.

items.title: Crypto for Advisors: AI Agents Using Crypto
items.summary: AI agents are executing transactions, forming “agentic finance.” Crypto is the financial backend for these autonomous systems. Learn use cases, risks, and what experts say.

items.title: Ripple-linked XRP stalls near $1.44 as 'triangle squeeze' nears breakout
items.summary: Price holds in tight range after high-volume move, with compression signaling a decisive move as institutional demand quietly builds.

items.title: Hyperliquid whale holds $38M short against Bitcoin, but does it matter?
items.summary: A Hyperliquid whale holds large short positions against Bitcoin and several altcoins. Does the position provide any signal on the markets’ future outcomes?

items.title: U.S. CFTC adds New York to string of states its suing to stop prediction market pushback
items.summary: The federal regulator has been suing states that seek to curtail prediction markets activity and claim it should be deemed state-regulated gaming.

items.title: Tether's $344 million USDT freeze linked to U.S. 'Economic Fury' against Iran regime
items.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. is seeking to choke off "all financial lifelines" for the regime.

items.title: Trump's DOJ drops probe that stood in way of president's pick to run Federal Reserve
items.summary: The Justice Department passed an investigation of Fed Chair Jerome Powell to the Fed's own inspector, which could clear a confirmation path for Kevin Warsh.

items.title: Jane Street asks court to reject Terraform claims tied to UST-LUNA crash
items.summary: A filing Thursday said the lawsuit rehashes events already settled in court and seeks damages for losses caused by internal misconduct.

items.title: Bitmine to buy 10,000 ether for $23.9 million from the Ethereum Foundation
items.summary: The transaction brings the firm’s holdings closer to its 5% of ETH target.

items.title: Researcher wins 1 bitcoin bounty for 'largest quantum attack' on underlying tech
items.summary: Independent researcher Giancarlo Lelli broke a 15-bit elliptic curve key on publicly accessible quantum hardware, 512 times larger than the previous public demonstration in September 2025.

items.title: SpaceX's $75 billion IPO could drain the liquidity that's helping lift bitcoin and crypto
items.summary: SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic are set to raise more than $240 billion combined from June through year-end, a capital pull larger than every venture-backed US IPO since 2000 combined, and crypto sits in the same liquidity pool.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aptos (APT) gains 3.5%, leading index higher
items.summary: Aave (AAVE), up 3.2% from Thursday, was also a top performer.
